summary: Comprehensive testing of Matching Logic Fix (Iteration 10). All 14 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend tests passed (100%). Phone normalization correctly handles float→int conversion, +91 prefix stripping, and leading zero removal. All 8 Naukri records matched to 8 Pipeline records (0 unmatched).

backend: GET /api/status shows correct counts (naukri=8, pipeline=8, registered=8)
GET /api/debug/matching verifies edge cases: uppercase email (Alice), +91 phone (Bob), mixed case email (Carol), 91- phone (Dave), phone-only match (Eve), email-only match (Frank)
GET /api/dashboard-counts returns correct subcategories (shortlisted=1, rejected=2, scheduled=6, attended=4)
POST /api/reprocess re-normalizes and rebuilds matching correctly
GET /api/role?jobRole=Software Developer returns 5 applicants with correct status
GET /api/role?jobRole=Data Analyst returns 3 applicants with correct status
GET /api/summary returns correct funnel stats for 2 job roles
GET /api/job-roles returns 2 unique roles with counts
Phone normalization: float→int conversion verified (no decimal artifacts)
Phone normalization: country code stripping verified (+91, 91-)
Phone normalization: leading zero stripping verified
frontend: Login page loads with form elements
Dashboard shows DB Status: Naukri=8, Pipeline=8, Registered=8
Dashboard shows Upload sections and Analytics links
Summary page shows funnel stats table with 2 job roles
Summary page shows correct counts: shortlisted=1, rejected=2, scheduled=6, attended=4
Roles page shows 2 role cards (Software Developer: 5, Data Analyst: 3)
Role card click navigates to /roles/:jobRole drilldown
Software Developer drilldown: Shows 5 applicants (Alice, Bob, Dave, Frank, Henry)
Software Developer drilldown: Status badges (Rejected, Attended, Registered, Interview Scheduled)
Data Analyst drilldown: Shows 3 applicants (Carol, Eve, Grace)
Data Analyst drilldown: Status badges (Interview Scheduled, Rejected, Shortlisted)
Role drilldown: Date filters section with start/end date inputs
Role drilldown: Filter and Reset buttons present
Role drilldown: Back button navigates to /roles

seed_data_creation: Test data already exists: 8 Naukri records with edge cases (uppercase emails, +91 phones, phone-only, email-only) and 8 Pipeline records. All 8 matched as registered_candidates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Matching logic fix verified working: (1) normalize_phone handles float→int conversion (9876543210.0 → 9876543210), (2) +91 and 91- prefixes stripped correctly, (3) leading zeros stripped for phones > 10 digits, (4) normalize_email lowercases all emails, (5) reprocess_matching re-normalizes before matching, (6) /api/debug/matching shows detailed match info per record, (7) /api/reprocess endpoint triggers full re-normalization and rebuild. All 8 edge case records matched correctly.
